productName: Journeyman CBN Blueberry Lemonade (100mg THC/50mg CBN)
description: A chef-inspired sweet-tart lemonade cannabis drink made for sipping cold, with bright flavor, a clean finish, and a smooth infused lift. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest. Bright, easy-drinking, and infused for a smooth edible-style experience.
